One of the things that I just want to cover real quick before I go, is that if someone does schedule with you and they don't schedule through the automated online portal, which plenty of people will because they'll call in or they'll text or whatever, you want to click this link and you want to schedule for them. Because what that will do is it will put them and you want to put whatever time is in your invite. We are in the schedule. So what you're going to want to do is go ahead and schedule that session for them. So you're going to schedule time and Susan called me and said she's coming in at 6 or whatever. And you're going to put her name in instead Susan test, leave, whatever. And then her email and you can get that from the leachy and put her phone number in there and that way she will get all the automated reminders so that she doesn't fall off the cracks. So whenever you get people who are scheduled, schedule using your own link and that way all the reminder stuff is taken care of so you don't have to think about it. Okay? Make sense? Fantastic?
